videos.headline: TCU struggles continue with pick in the red zone
videos.description: TCU's offense has yet to find its groove against SMU, punctuated when Kenny Hill's pass is picked off by Anthony Rhone to end the Horned Frogs' drive.

videos.headline: TCU opens second half in a flash with a 75-yard TD
videos.description: After struggling the entire first half, TCU goes 75 yards on the first snap of the second half to take a 13-3 lead over SMU.

videos.headline: Perfect fade to Austin puts TCU up 20-3
videos.description: TCU is starting to roll in the second half, especially after Kenny Hill throws the fade to a leaping Jaelan Austin for the touchdown to give TCU a 20-3 lead over SMU.
